metadata.description: Production-grade observability for multi-agent Python apps. Supports LangGraph, CrewAI, Microsoft Agent Framework, Anthropic Agents SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, smolagents, LlamaIndex, Google ADK, and a Custom no-framework path × Arize Phoenix, Langfuse, SigNoz, Elastic APM, LangSmith, Opik, and Jaeger.

plugins.name: observent
plugins.description: Wire up observability for your multi-agent Python app in one command. 9 frameworks × 7 backends, correct span hierarchy and context propagation out of the box.
